"[7] TELEGRAPH ON RAMP TO SB 605 CLOSED"
"[6] 2,3,4 LANES CLOSED FROM WASHINGTON TO S/OF TELEGRAPH"
"[5] CLOSURE IN PLACE UNTIL MONDAY 0500 HOURS"
"[4] WASHINGTON OFF FROM SB 605 AND WASHINGTON ON TO SB 605 CLOSED"
"[1] 55 HOUR CLOSURE /// SB 605 LOS NIETOS OFR TO TELEGRAPH"
"[1] WHI DODG SD VS ONE WAY SIGN "
"[14] A67-091 START 1185 GRY TOYT PRIUS W/ MOD LEFT SIDE DAMG [Shared]"
"[13] [Notification] [CHP]-ADD RP AVDG PED IS NOW IN NB SIDE CD BET FRANKLIN AND AME [Shared]"
"[1] XRAY PUSHING A SHOPPING CART WITH A WHI DOG "
"[9] RP ADVD IF NEEDED RP CAN LEAD UNITS INTO WHERE VEH IS"
"[8] RP WAS XFER FRM CAPITAL RP ADVS DID NOT HAVE SERVICE AT THE TIME THEY PASSED BY VEH"
"[5] RP ADVS IT WAS ON BUCHANAN RD BY OLD WEIGH STATION IN TUOLUMNE CITY"
"[1] 1144 SMALL BLK DOG IN WB LN"
"[1] LARGE TIRE TREAD IN THE LEFT LN "
"[5] VEH WAS PARKED AT RPS R "
"[8] ALSO REPORTED JNO REST AREA OFR [Shared]"
"[4] [Appended, 13:19:51] [2] FLAMES AND SMOKE SEEN FROM UNDER THE VEH "
"[3] [Appended, 13:19:51] [1] BLK UNK SD // DRVR IS MIDDLE EASTERN MALE LSW RED SHIRT // MALE OO VEH"
"[1] GRY SD / SMOKING / FLAMES FRM UNDER / RHS"
"[14] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 1182-Trfc Collision-No Inj to 1179-Trfc Collision-1141 Enrt by CHP [Shared]"
"[13] PER WIT -- BOTH VEH ON RHS // OCCUP IN BLU VEH ARE STILL INSIDE VEH [Shared]"
"[10] RP ADV NEITHER VEH IS DRIVEABLE // UNK IF NISS HAS 1185 ENRT [Shared]"
"[4] WOULD NOT LET RP IN // THEN A BIT LATER BREAK CHECKED RP AND CAUSED TC"
"[3] BLK NISS WAS BEING AGGRESSIVE PRIOR TO TC "
"[2] BOTH VEHS ON RHS PARTIALLY 1125 IN SLOW LANE "
"[1] BLK NISS FRONTIER VS BLU SUBA WRX "
"[10] A108-029 SO FAR 1181 // 2 VEH BLOCKING CD"
"[1] ONG CONE IN FAST LANE // HOV IS CLOSED OFF WITH CONES BUT 1 CONE IS 1125 IN FAST LANE"
"[6] 23 1022 ETA FOR 1185 - SHE HAS SOMEONE ENRT WITH GASS "
"[2] SOLO XRAY // REQ CHP FOR SAFETY // PTY 1021 3A AND THEIR ETA IS 1.5 HOURS"
"[1] BLK JEEP CHK // STALLED IN EB LANE // POSS OOG , VEH IS NOT ABLE TO BE PUT INTO NEUTRAL"
"[2] ^PER CT651-1 IT WILL BE CLOSED FOR THE WEEKEND, ETO MONDAY "
"[1] ^PER CT, REST AREA IS CLOSED DUE TO SOME PLUMBING ISSUES"
"[11] [Notification] [CHP]-PER CDF RIDER BEING XPORTED TO INLAND HOSP BY MEDIC 70 // DID NOT ADVS EXT OF INJ"

details.IncidentDetail: "[6] CORRECTION BIG RIG PULLED TO RS - WB 60 JEO MARKET "

"[1] WHI NISS ENVY VN - IN CD WILL ADV"
"[18] RP ADV SHE DOESNT HAVE DMG TO HER CAR BECAUSE THE FORD SUV HIT HER CAR / SAG RP TO KEEP DISTANCE FRM THEM AND NOT TO ENGAGE"
"[17] ALL PTYS 1023 AT SHELL GS 1550 E ONT- RP CONFIRMED SHES AT SHELL -- NEG INJS IN RP'S VEH - UNKIN THE OTHER "
"[16] TC OCCD I15 S NO/ ONT 74-34"
"[10] RP WILL BE IN THE CHEVERON PLOT 4880 S MOTOR LN , ONT "
"[8] NOW ADVG NISS DRVR SMELLED LIKE ALCOHOL // VEH LS NB 15"
